languages.text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of PERB, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
If the user moved during their turn, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 round. For each stack of fatigued on the user, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to the user's current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum has wounds equal to 1 and cannot dodge, parry, or block attacks or take cover.

If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

languages.text:
Если обладатель аугмента перемещался в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, в каждой зоне {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}стратегического плана{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} появляется тактический симулякр. За каждые 10 единиц бонуса {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g} обладателя аугмента на случайной клетке, соседней с его текущей позицией, появляется ещё 1 тактический симулякр.
{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Здоровье{/g} тактического симулякра равно 1; он не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} и блокировать атаки и прятаться в {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытии{/g}.

languages.text:
Si el usuario se ha movido en su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, aparece un simulacro táctico en cada zona de {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tácticas de combate{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Por cada 10 puntos de bonificación por {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} del usuario, aparece 1 simulacro táctico más en una casilla adyacente a su posición actual.
Un simulacro táctico solo tiene 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}herida{/g} y no puede realizar acciones de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g} ni bloqueo, ni tampoco puede {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cubrirse{/g}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

Un simulacro táctico solo tiene 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}herida{/g} y no puede realizar acciones de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g} ni bloqueo, ni tampoco puede {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cubrirse{/g}.

languages.text:
Hat sich der Nutzer während seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} bewegt, erscheint in jedem {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Kampftaktiken{/g}-Bereich 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang ein Taktisches Simulakrum. Für jeweils 10 Punkte des {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmungsbonus{/g} des Nutzers, erscheint +1 Taktisches Simulakrum auf einem zufälligen Nachbarfeld.
Ein Taktisches Simulakrum hat 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}. Es kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parieren{/g}, blocken oder in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} gehen.
languages.original_text:

For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

languages.text:
Si l'utilisateur s'est déplacé pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, un simulacre tactique apparaît dans chaque zone de {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tactiques de combat{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Pour chaque tranche de 10 points de bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} de l'utilisateur, 1 simulacre tactique supplémentaire apparaît sur une case aléatoire adjacente à sa position actuelle.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} du simulacre sont égales à 1 et il ne peut ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parer{/g} ni bloquer ni se {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}mettre à couvert{/g}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

Si l'utilisateur s'est déplacé pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, un simulacre tactique apparaît dans chaque zone de {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tactiques de combat{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. languages.text:
Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} esnasında hareket etmişse her {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Çatışma Taktikleri{/g} alanında bir Taktiksel Simulakrum belirir. Taktiksel Simulakrumlar, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} kalır. Kullanıcının üzerindeki her 10 puanlık {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} bonusu için mevcut konumunun bitişiğindeki rastgele bir hücrede 1 Taktiksel Simulakrum daha belirir.
Taktiksel Simulakrum'un {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı 1'dir. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g}, bloklama yapamaz ve {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} alamaz.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

Taktiksel Simulakrum'un {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı 1'dir. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g}, bloklama yapamaz ve {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} alamaz.

languages.text:
使用者若在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}移动过，便会在所有{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}战斗策略{/g}区域内生成1个战术幻象，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。使用者身上每有10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}加值，便会额外在其当前位置相邻的1个随机格子上生成1个战术幻象。
战术幻象的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}为1，且无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}、格挡或进入{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者若在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}移动过，便会在所有{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}战斗策略{/g}区域内生成1个战术幻象，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。使用者身上每有10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}加值，便会额外在其当前位置相邻的1个随机格子上生成1个战术幻象。
战术幻象的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}为1，且无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}、格挡或进入{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中に移動した場合、各{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}戦闘戦術{/g}の範囲に1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、戦術シミュラクラムが出現する。使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}ボーナス10ポイントごとに、現在位置に隣接するランダムなマスにさらに+1体の戦術シミュラクラムが出現する。
戦術シミュラクラムの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}は1に等しく、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}受け流し{/g}、ブロック、{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽{/g}を取ることができない。
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in each {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. For every 10 points of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, +1 more Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

戦術シミュラクラムの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}は1に等しく、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}受け流し{/g}、ブロック、{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽{/g}を取ることができない。
